summary: Tested 3 new features: capital allocation modal + API, trades %-PnL + unified filter, optimizer scope=coins + override markers. Backend: 12/12 pytest passed. Frontend: all UI flows validated (capital modal, save, bw-alloc, pnl-filter replacement, optimizer override dot+legend).

minor.issue: Reads override state from in-memory autotrader.config.strategy_coin_configs which persists after DB delete_one, causing stale symbols in results until backend restart. Consider re-reading from DB or invalidating cache on delete.

ui_bugs.issue: Save button uses data-testid='capital-save-btn' but review request specifies 'capital-save-button'. Naming inconsistency — either doc or code should be aligned.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Non-blocking but should be fixed.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Align data-testid naming — either rename 'capital-save-btn' to 'capital-save-button' in code, or update the spec.
OPTIONAL: Fix optimizer_overrides endpoint to reflect DB state (avoid stale in-memory cache after cleanup/deletions).
OPTIONAL: Fix hydration warning '<span> child of <option>' in optimizer dropdowns.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2262 lines — should be split by domain (autotrade, optimizer, analytics, strategies).

optimizer_overrides reads from in-memory config only for strategy_coin_configs. Since DB is source of truth after cleanup, cached view can drift. Suggest either invalidating the in-memory entry on delete, or querying DB in the endpoint.
AutoTradeManager.allocated_capital: for live+percent when total is None, returns None -> UI shows blank; acceptable but worth documenting.
Capital POST validation good (scope/mode/value); consider adding upper bound on base_balance.
seed_data_creation: Inserted TEST_TRADE_PNLPCT into auto_trades to verify computed.pnl_pct (=2.5) and pnl_pct_capital (=25.0), then removed. Applied scope=coins override for scalping_4_rules/BTCUSDT then cleaned up (Mongo + backend restart to flush in-memory cache).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend restart is needed to clear autotrader.config.strategy_coin_configs cache after DB cleanup for optimizer overrides. The test file test_capital_and_optimizer.py contains full regression suite; run with `pytest backend/tests/test_capital_and_optimizer.py -v -o addopts=''` to disable xdist (avoids race between parallel workers touching global paper allocation).
verified_features: POST /api/autotrade/capital validates scope, mode, fixed>0, 0<percent<=100, requires admin JWT
Paper percent mode: base 1000 * 25% = allocated 250.0 (verified via both /capital and /balance)
GET /api/autotrade/balance includes 'allocation' object with live & paper
POST /api/optimizer/apply scope=coins persists to strategy_coin_configs + coin_params; overrides endpoint returns BTCUSDT
Frontend: capital-tab-live/paper, capital-mode-full/fixed/percent, capital-percent-input, capital-preview all work
Frontend: validation at 150% shows capital-validation-error 'Prozentsatz muss zwischen 1 und 100 liegen' and disables save
Frontend: after saving 25% paper, bw-alloc shows 'Bot 250.00 · frei 250.00'
Frontend: view-trades tab uses ONLY pnl-filter (pnl-filter-all/live/paper); old trade-filter and trade-filter-* are removed
Frontend: Paper filter shows 'PERFORMANCE JE STRATEGIE · PAPER' title
Frontend: optimizer-button opens optimizer with opt-override-dot-BTCUSDT + opt-override-legend when override present
